queued.title: OpenClaw → Claude live session bridge
queued.what: When a Claude session opens, register the session ID to a known file. OpenClaw reads it and uses sessions_send to target the active session for real-time two-way communication.
queued.blocker: Claude Code does not currently expose a stable inbound ACP endpoint. Revisit when ACP story matures or if OpenClaw finds a workaround.

queued.title: Agent-04 Reddit Pipeline v2
queued.what: Upgrade Agent-04 from public search scraping to proper Reddit OAuth API with structured feature extraction. Treat Reddit as a narrative pressure sensor, not a signal engine. Design alongside Q-005 (ApeWisdom) and Q-006 (Stocktwits) as a unified retail sentiment layer — not three independent data pulls.
queued.priority_features: mention acceleration, cross-subreddit propagation, narrative classification (squeeze/earnings/YOLO), authenticity score
queued.blocker: 60-day paper gate not yet reached. Do not build before proven execution stack.
queued.prereq: Reddit developer app (self-serve OAuth via reddit.com/prefs/apps — script type). Data API enterprise application was rejected as unnecessary; PRAW OAuth is the correct approach for read-only subreddit monitoring.

queued.title: ApeWisdom integration — retail sentiment layer
queued.what: Integrate ApeWisdom free API into the intelligence layer. Returns ticker mention counts, rank, and 24h trend direction across WSB and finance subreddits. No auth required. Evaluate whether this replaces or supplements the full Reddit PRAW build in Q-004. Agent integration: feed mention rank and acceleration into Agent-04 or a new Agent-04b as a pre-processed retail sentiment signal. Must align with existing signal hierarchy — corroborating input only, never a standalone trade trigger. Cross-reference against Agent-01 (news), Agent-05 (technical), and options flow before any weight is assigned.
queued.prereq: None — public API, no key required. Endpoint: https://apewisdom.io/api/v1.0/filter/all-stocks/

queued.title: Stocktwits integration — finance-specific sentiment feed
queued.what: Integrate Stocktwits public API for per-ticker sentiment and message volume. Better signal-to-noise than Reddit for individual tickers since the platform is finance-only. Free, no key required for public endpoints. Agent integration: feed bullish/bearish ratio and message volume spikes into the intelligence layer alongside ApeWisdom (Q-005). Design the combined sentiment layer so Agent-04 can weight Reddit narrative (squeeze/macro), Stocktwits momentum (ticker-level), and ApeWisdom rank (retail crowd direction) as a unified retail sentiment score — not three independent signals. Must not override options flow, news, or technical analysis.
queued.prereq: None — public API. Review Stocktwits API docs for rate limits before building.

queued.title: Form LLC — unlock business entity + tax deductions
queued.what: Form a single-member LLC to operate all business activities under. Unlocks deductibility of LLM subscriptions (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.), hardware (new machine, Section 179), software tools, internet, home office, and education. You do not need revenue to form — you need to be operating in pursuit of profit, which you are. File with your state's Secretary of State, get an EIN from the IRS (free, online, takes 10 min), open a dedicated business checking account. Total cost: $50-200 depending on state.
queued.prereq: Decide on LLC name and state of formation. Consult a CPA to confirm home state specifics before filing.

queued.title: Profit path — Option 1: YouTube / content + tools
queued.what: Document the build publicly. 'I built a 16-agent AI trading pipeline' is genuinely interesting content with a real audience. Monetizes through AdSense, sponsorships, and naturally leads to selling templates, prompt packs, or the OpenClaw setup as a product. Lowest regulatory risk, lowest startup cost, builds audience before you have anything to sell — audience is the asset. Strategy: start with build-log style videos (what you built, why, what broke), layer in tutorials as the system matures, eventually gate advanced content or tools behind a paid tier. Requires LLC (Q-007) to treat revenue properly.
queued.prereq: LLC formed (Q-007). Basic recording setup. Decide on channel identity/branding.

queued.title: Profit path — Option 2: AI automation consulting / agency
queued.what: Sell the skillset, not a product. You know how to build multi-agent systems with real infrastructure — most businesses don't have anyone who can do this. One retainer client at $3-5k/month covers all subscriptions and hardware. Services: custom agent pipelines, OpenClaw-style automation setups, AI workflow integration for small businesses. No product needed to start — just a landing page, a LinkedIn presence, and one warm outreach campaign. Strategy: close 1-2 clients to fund the hobby side, keep scope tight (don't build something you can't maintain), productize repeatable work into templates over time. Requires LLC (Q-007) for contracts and invoicing.
queued.prereq: LLC formed (Q-007). Simple contract template. Define service scope and pricing before first outreach.

queued.title: Profit path — Option 3: trading system product (post paper gate)
queued.what: Offer a managed paper→live trading service, signal subscription, or white-labeled pipeline to other traders. Highest upside but significant regulatory surface — must research RIA registration requirements, determine whether signal distribution constitutes investment advice under SEC rules, and draft appropriate disclaimers. Do not build or market this before: (a) 60-day paper gate passed with clean results, (b) LLC formed (Q-007), (c) legal review completed. Strategy: start as a signal transparency product (show the thesis, not a buy recommendation), build track record publicly, consult a securities attorney before any paid offering. This is the long-term path — fund it with Options 1 or 2 first.
queued.blocker: 60-day paper gate not yet passed. Legal review required before any public offering.
queued.prereq: LLC formed (Q-007). Clean paper trading track record. Securities attorney consultation. RIA registration research.

completed.title: Stale Signal Guard
completed.what: Agent-11 v1.2 + order_submitter.py: mandatory re-evaluation at live price when >60 min late. Hard block at >3h unless stale_signal_max_hours in risk_policy.json.

completed.title: Verify trade journal + KPI aggregator (2026-03-06)
completed.what: Confirmed all 4 delayed fills captured (AVGO, MRVL, NVDA, MU). Fixed UTC date bug in trade_journal.py — was using UTC date, now uses ET date via ZoneInfo.
